gtceu.modifier.absolute_parallel.name: %sAbsolute Parallel Hatch:
gtceu.modifier.absolute_parallel.descrip: §7Enables the use of absolute parallel hatches
§7Absolute Parallel hatches allow a machine to run parallel recipes without the duration increase.
gtceu.modifier.bulk_processing.name: %sBulk Processing:
gtceu.modifier.bulk_processing.descripti: §7If possible, the machine will run exactly 16 parallels.
§7The recipe duration will be increased by 13x
gtceu.modifier.throughput_boosting.name: %sThroughput Boosting:
gtceu.modifier.throughput_boosting.descr: §7If possible, the machine will run exactly 4 parallels.
§7Together, these recipes are processed at 1.6x the rate
§7and 0.95x the energy consumption of a single recipe.
gtceu.modifier.fake_fusion_overclock.des: §7Unlike most machines Fusion Reactors do not overclock by upgrading the energy hatches on them.
§7To overclock Fusion Reactors you instead have to build the next tier.
§7Each overclock doubles the energy cost while halving the duration. §b[2:2]
§7Fusion Reflectors provide you with a different way of overclocking your Fusion Reactors.
§7Instead of relying on higher tier Fusion Reactors you can upgrade the Reflectors to speed up recipes.
§7For each tier of Reflector above the one required for the recipe, a fusion overclock will be applied.
§7These stack with normal Fusion Overclock but keep in mind that while power cost may increase, the recipe voltage will not overclock.
